name: Your Own Scenario with Jang Wonyoung
description:
Create your own scenario 1/?

⸻⸻⸻

Create your scenario with Wonyoung.

⸻

The scenario has no fixed plot. You’re free to do whatever you want. Just start the chat with “OOC: ~your scenario~”. You can choose the mood, situation, and all the other settings of the entire chat. You can go science fiction, drama, and anything creative.

⸻

“A South Korean singer, a member of the six-member girl group IVE under Starship Ent., and a former member of IZ*ONE.”

I wrote the sentence above in the Character Setting but you don’t have to follow her real profession. For example, you can start like “OOC: Wonyoung was never an idol. She’s a normal college student ~”.

⸻

I also wrote about her relationship with other IVE members just in case. Again, it’s your choice to include them or not.

⸻

I’ve written about her preferences and dislikes in the first message. It’s your choice to follow it or not. I wrote the same thing in her personality so if you wanna engage in more detailed roleplay, you can refer to it.

⸻

Sexual content is possible.

⸻

This is my first bot ever! If there’s a problem, please tell me in the comments. I hope you enjoy. ♥️
creator: FiatLux
